prompt: Single centered boss sprite for Galaxy Raiders, hardcore arcade shmup modern pixel art. Background must be 100% solid flat #FF00FF magenta only, no gradients, no shadows, no text, no labels, no UI. One boss only, centered, transparent-friendly subject, full silhouette contained with generous magenta margin on all sides, no opaque pixels touching image edges. Style: military biomechanical sci-fi horror, dark crisp outline, high contrast, glowing visor, intimidating silhouette, readable instantly on a dark space background, not cute, not cartoon, not a flat icon. Boss: TENIENTE, an elite military execution unit, crimson armored assault craft with sharp dive-bomber silhouette, pointed nose facing downward toward player, multiple weapon pods under swept wings, glowing red visor/cockpit, ruthless commander feeling, angular officer-like armor crests, aggressive attack geometry. Emphasize red/black armor, weapon pods, sharp forward dive shape, hostile visor, oppressive elite military presence. Pixel art should be clean and readable at 96x96, silhouettes more important than tiny detail.
